title: acetosella aganophila
intro: Acetosella aganophila, a species of flowering plant in the family Oxalidaceae, is also known as the mountain sorrel. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to treat digestive issues and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its high levels of vitamin C, which can help boost the immune system and fight off infections. Acetosella aganophila can be prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its leaves, or by using them in a salve or tincture to apply topically for skin issues.
